articles.title: Prediction markets don’t trust election survey polls; Favor Trump over Harris
articles.description: Prediction markets have become popular during this presidential election year in 2024, especially after implementing cryptocurrency payments via Circle’s USDC. … Continue reading The post Prediction markets don’t trust election survey polls; Favor Trump over Harris appeared first on Finbold.
